description: Karaite betrothal document. Date: Nisan 16 Nisan 5433 AM (1673 CE). Location: Cairo. The previously unmarried bride is Farj bt. Yeshūʿa b. Yiṣḥaq and the groom Daniel b. Yosef b. Shelomo Ḥazzan. Daniel takes the customary oath not to travel to any cities outside Cairo, except Jerusalem. The groom's contributions toward the marriage are listed as: 50 kesif + 960 medin + 200 medin + 1000 medin. The bottom of the document was reused for writing practice of the opening date formula in legal documents. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
